name: mouse_coding
description: Mouse protein-coding intervals (CDS exons) defined by GENCODE M33 / Ensembl 110 on GRCm39. ~22,000 protein-coding genes (Pertea & Salzberg 2010 context places mouse at ~22-23k, similar to human ~20k). Average CDS GC ~0.52; codon usage biased toward NCG-poor synonymous codons compared with vertebrate norm. ORF density is the strongest distinguishing feature versus non-coding intervals.
